omitted_declarations.policy_reference: When using the Services your personal data (incl. any video footage) will be transferred into and stored in the US. The transfer is necessary for the performance of the contract and delivery of the Services by TP-Link (Art. 6 (1) b), 49 (1) b) GDPR.
